_doc: HAE user config template. Copied to <dataRoot>/config.json on first install. Holds operator-private fields that override config.default.json. NEVER commit this file with real values.
_haeDataRoot_doc: Override data dir location. Leave null to use env var $HAE_DATA_DIR or default %USERPROFILE%\.hae.

weighting._doc: Add cwd path prefixes (e.g. C:\Projects\my-app) or basenames (my-app) for projects you actively work on. Run /hae:home add <path> after install. /hae:home auto-detect populates top-N from your raw capture.

statusline._doc: Chain HAE statusline AFTER another tool's statusline command. Common: OMC HUD. Set to that tool's status command string. Leave null/empty for HAE-only.
